TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Don_Ameche, title = Don_Ameche, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Ameche} }

S.FORM: == Don Ameche == kawas tay 1908, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Don Ameche, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) qnxan nya Don Ameche ga, la'iy ni Felice Amici. Don Ameche maki tay kawas 1932 msqun ki Honore Prendergast. Don Ameche, minkahul sa Kenosha, Wisconsin. hiya yaba(Felice Amici) quo sinsiy pimcyogan nya maki Ascoli,Piceno,Marche. Barbara,Etta,Hertel yaya lalu nya,maki Scottish Irish ru German ramu. Ameche te sazing laqi, maki cyugal mlikuy Umberto ,James ru Louis ru maki payat kneril laqi Elizabeth Catherine,Mary ru Anna. Ameche mqwas beh Marquette krahu' pqwasan biru,Loras ru Wisconsin- Madison .1954 kawas magal Heisman Trophy sqabu . qnxan na sraral Don Ameche 1908 kawas 5 byacing 31 ryax htgan beh Wisconsin, Kenosha,Italy . mintzyuwaw nya Don Ameche hiya ga m' Engi. Don Ameche sa kawas 1935, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na Engi ru mqwas. mhuqil 1993 kawas 12 byacing 6 ryax,cyux nbu maki ngasal mhuqil la(85 kawas). mincyogan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

== Don Ameche == kawas tay 1908, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Don Ameche, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) qnxan nya Don Ameche ga, la'iy ni Felice Amici. Don Ameche maki tay kawas 1932 msqun ki Honore Prendergast. Don Ameche, minkahul sa Kenosha, Wisconsin. hiya yaba(Felice Amici) quo sinsiy pimcyogan nya maki Ascoli,Piceno,Marche. Barbara,Etta,Hertel yaya lalu nya,maki Scottish Irish ru German ramu. Ameche te sazing laqi, maki cyugal mlikuy Umberto ,James ru Louis ru maki payat kneril laqi Elizabeth Catherine,Mary ru Anna. Ameche mqwas beh Marquette krahu' pqwasan biru,Loras ru Wisconsin- Madison .1954 kawas magal Heisman Trophy sqabu . qnxan na sraral Don Ameche 1908 kawas 5 byacing 31 ryax htgan beh Wisconsin, Kenosha,Italy . mintzyuwaw nya Don Ameche hiya ga m' Engi. Don Ameche sa kawas 1935, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na Engi ru mqwas. mhuqil 1993 kawas 12 byacing 6 ryax,cyux nbu maki ngasal mhuqil la(85 kawas). mincyogan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

(wal mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) qnxan nja *on ame ¶~ ®ńße …£a, la Ēij ni *eli ¶~ ®e ami ¶~ ®i. *on ame ¶~ ®ńße maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki ńßonore pren*er…£as~…ēt. *on ame ¶~ ®ńße, minkańßul s~…ēa kenos~…ēńßa, wis~…ē ¶~ ®ons~…ēin. ńßija jaő≤a(*eli ¶~ ®e ami ¶~ ®i) quo s~…ēins~…ēij pim ¶~ ®jo…£an nja maki as~…ē ¶~ ®oli,pi ¶~ ®eno,mar ¶~ ®ńße. ő≤arő≤ara,etta,ńßertel jaja lalu nja,maki s~…ē ¶~ ®ottis~…ēńß iris~…ēńß ru …£erman ramu. ame ¶~ ®ńße te s~…ēaziŇč laqi, maki ¶~ ®ju…£al mlikuj umő≤erto ,*ames~…ē ru louis~…ē ru maki pajat kneril laqi elizaő≤etńß ¶~ ®atńßerine,marj ru anna. ame ¶~ ®ńße mqwas~…ē ő≤eńß marquette krańßu Ē pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru,loras~…ē ru wis~…ē ¶~ ®ons~…ēin- ma*is~…ēon .**** kawas~…ē ma…£al ńßeis~…ēman tropńßj s~…ēqaő≤u . qnxan na s~…ēraral *on ame ¶~ ®ńße **** kawas~…ē * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ** rjax ńßt…£an ő≤eńß wis~…ē ¶~ ®ons~…ēin, kenos~…ēńßa,italj . mintzjuwaw nja *on ame ¶~ ®ńße ńßija …£a m Ē eŇči. *on ame ¶~ ®ńße s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŇči ru mqwas~…ē. mńßuqil **** kawas~…ē ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč * rjax, ¶~ ®jux nő≤u maki Ňčas~…ēal mńßuqil la(** kawas~…ē). min ¶~ ®jo…£an nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
